chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Application No.S-153 of 2018 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 28-05-2019 Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, D.P.G.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the applicant. It appears that on the last date of hearing i.e 15.4.2019 brief was held on behalf of Advocate for the applicant and matter was adjourned to a date in office. It appears that after filing this Criminal Miscellaneous Application the applicant has lost interest, therefore, this Criminal Miscellaneous Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
